title: frontend: useKubeObjectList: Fix state overwrite during render
author: ayushmaan-16

findings.description: Second commit missing SubArea: 'frontend: Add useKubeObjectList state update regression test' should include 'useKubeObjectList:'
Functional update setListsToWatch(prev => ...) avoids stale-closure reads from batched render-phase updates
Early return when additions and removals both zero avoids unnecessary re-render
Regression test covers simultaneous add 'c' and remove 'a' — exactly the previously broken scenario
